tool_uses.input: {"command": "cd /Users/gladyscavero/Documents/PEOPL/GitHub/claw-code/rust && cargo test --workspace --exclude runtime 2>&1; echo \"---SEPARATOR---\"; cd /Users/gladyscavero/Documents/PEOPL/GitHub/claw-code/rust && cargo test -p runtime --lib --test integration_tests --test message_trace_test 2>&1", "description": "Run tests excluding broken test file", "timeout": 120000}

tool_uses.name: Bash
tool_uses.input:
{"command": "cd /Users/gladyscavero/Documents/PEOPL/GitHub/claw-code/rust && find crates -name "*.rs" | while read f; do
  # Extract function signatures with line numbers, then count lines per function
  awk '
  /^[[:space:]]*(pub[[:space:]]+)?(async[[:space:]]+)?fn[[:space:]]+[a-zA-Z_]/ {
    if (fn_name != "" && fn_start > 0) {
      print fn_lines " " branch_count " " FILENAME ":" fn_start " " fn_name
    }
    fn_name = $0
    gsub(/^[[:space:]]+/, "", fn_name)
    fn_start = NR
    fn_lines = 0
    branch_count = 0
    brace_depth = 0
    in_fn = 1
  }
  in_fn {
    fn_lines++
    # Count branch points for cyclomatic complexity
    n = gsub(/if[[:space:]]+/, "&")
    branch_count += n
    n = gsub(/else[[:space:]]+if/, "&")
    branch_count += n  
    n = gsub(/match[[:space:]]+/, "&")
    branch_count += n
    n = gsub(/while[[:space:]]+/, "&")
    branch_count += n
    n = gsub(/for[[:space:]]+/, "&")
    branch_count += n
    n = gsub(/&&/, "&")
    branch_count += n
    n = gsub(/\|\|/, "&")
    branch_count += n
    n = gsub(/\?/, "&")
    branch_count += n
  }
  END {
    if (fn_name != "" && fn_start > 0) {
      print fn_lines " " branch_count " " FILENAME ":" fn_start " " fn_name
    }
  }
  ' "$f"
done | sort -rn | head -30", "description": "Find longest functions with complexity metrics", "timeout": 30000}
